---
title: "Example Document"
author: "Min Khant Aung"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Introduction

This is my example Quarto document for Assignment 2.

# Small Example

```{r}
summary(cars)
```

# Branch Changes

This section combines the changes from both main and testbranch.

```{r}
boxplot(cars$speed)
hist(cars$speed)
```
